description: Wide-format dataset for ANOVA analysis. Each row represents one respondent at one survey wave.

cluster.description: Cluster assignment generated by upstream clustering pipeline (used as IV)

wave.description: Survey wave/time indicator (e.g. Y0, Y1, Y2)

*.description: Any numeric feature that can potentially be analyzed as a dependent variable (DV)

rules: Each row represents one respondent for one survey wave.
ResponseId is used for data integrity and record alignment. It is not used in ANOVA calculations.
The cluster column is used as the independent variable (IV) for One-Way ANOVA (current scope: single-factor analysis).
The wave column is used for descriptive wave-level mean comparisons in the current One-Way ANOVA reporting scope.
All numeric feature columns are treated as potential dependent variables (DV candidates), including survey-derived metrics and census metadata variables.
The analysis layer performs ANOVA only on DVs explicitly provided by user input.
Additional numeric features may be added without changing the schema.
